310 GG0130C2_TOILT_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130C2_TOILT_GOAL_BY_END_CD GG0130C2 Discharge Goal Toileting Hygiene Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for toileting hygiene care. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for toileting hygiene care. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate
